account/billing.title: Billing
account/billing.description: BarnBuddy supports Free and Premium plans.

account/preferences.title: Preferences
account/preferences.description: Account preferences change how BarnBuddy feels and what information is emphasized.

deployment/railway-docs-site.title: Railway Docs Site
deployment/railway-docs-site.description: This Docusaurus app is separate from the main BarnBuddy client and server.

getting-started/add-first-animal.title: Add Your First Animal
getting-started/add-first-animal.description: Animals are the center of BarnBuddy records.

getting-started/create-account.title: Create an Account
getting-started/create-account.description: BarnBuddy accounts are used to keep each farm's records private and tied to the correct user.

getting-started/dashboard-tour.title: Dashboard Tour
getting-started/dashboard-tour.description: The dashboard is the main workspace for BarnBuddy.

getting-started/setup-first-herd.title: Set Up Your First Herd
getting-started/setup-first-herd.description: Herds keep animals grouped by farm, project, species, pasture, barn, class, or any structure that fits your workflow.

intro.title: BarnBuddy Documentation
intro.description: BarnBuddy helps small farms, FFA students, 4H families, and hobby producers keep livestock records in one organized place.

premium/exports.title: Exports
premium/exports.description: Exports help turn BarnBuddy records into PDFs for review, sharing, and offline use.

premium/feed.title: Feed Records
premium/feed.description: Feed records help track herd-level feed purchases and planning.

premium/finance.title: Finance
premium/finance.description: Finance records track animal-level income and expenses.

premium/inventory.title: Inventory Tracking
premium/inventory.description: Inventory is a Premium herd-level tool for tracking supplies used around the farm.

premium/overview.title: Premium Overview
premium/overview.description: Premium expands BarnBuddy beyond basic records.

premium/reminders.title: Automatic Reminders
premium/reminders.description: Automatic reminders help surface upcoming care work.

premium/reproduction.title: Reproduction
premium/reproduction.description: Reproduction records help track breeding pairs, pregnancy checks, due dates, birth outcomes, and offspring.

records/animals.title: Animal Records
records/animals.description: Each animal has a profile that collects basic identity, health, vet, and Premium records.

records/farm-overview.title: Farm Overview
records/farm-overview.description: Farm Overview gives a herd-level snapshot instead of a single animal record.

records/health-records.title: Health Records
records/health-records.description: Health records keep care history attached to the animal that received care.

records/herds.title: Herds
records/herds.description: Herds organize animals and make reporting easier.

records/vet-visits.title: Vet Visits
records/vet-visits.description: Vet visits record professional care, treatments, medications, and follow-up needs.

support/contact.title: Contact Support
support/contact.description: For now, use the Contact page on the main BarnBuddy website.

support/faq.title: FAQ
support/faq.description: Can I use BarnBuddy for one animal?
